title: More Headwinds Appearing For Dry Bulk Market
section_path: More Headwinds Appearing For Dry Bulk Market
section_path_text: More Headwinds Appearing For Dry Bulk Market
summary:
Main
By Jeffrey Landsberg
Dry bulk rates were mixed last week, with panamax and supramax rates rising while capesize and handysize rates declined. Those declines were small, though, and overall rates still remain at healthy levels across the board. Much bigger news to come out last week is that China's steel production has climbed even further, is now at the highest level seen since July , and is continuing to maintain a small amount of year-on-year growth.
